ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5(A)(1), WHICH REQUIRES MEET-AND-CONFER REGARDING "ALL OF THE SPECIFIC ALLEGATIONS" MOVANT "BELIEVES ARE SUBJECT TO BEING STRICKEN." (THOMAS DEC. 2:1-9.) RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS ARE NOW DUE BY APRIL 8, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT HILLARY THOMAS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for defendant's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The motions may be re-filed for a Monday-Thursday after May 28, bearing the new hearing date. Plaintiff complied with 2.7(B) and need not re-file his papers.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Ordered off calendar for defendant's noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The motions may be re-filed for a Monday-Thursday after May 28, bearing the new hearing date. Plaintiff complied with 2.7(B) and need not re-file his papers.

MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT HILLARY THOMAS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5(a)(1), which requires meet-and-confer regarding "all of the specific allegations" movant "believes are subject to being stricken." (Thomas Dec. 2:1-9.) Responsive pleadings are now due by April 8, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
